mapper.select: select m.msg_id, m.msg_type, m.title, m.content, m.order_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_name, m.priority, m.target_type, m.target_id, m.target_role, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, m.del_flag, case when m.target_type = 'user' then p.real_name when m.target_type = 'role' then m.target_role when m.target_type = 'all' then '全部用户' else '' end as target_user_name from sys_msg m left join sys_user_profile p on m.target_type = 'user' and p.user_id = m.target_id where m.del_flag = '0' and msg_type = #{msgType} and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%') order by create_time desc

select m.msg_id, m.msg_type, m.title, m.content, m.order_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_name, m.priority, m.target_type, m.target_id, m.target_role, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, m.del_flag, case when m.target_type = 'user' then p.real_name when m.target_type = 'role' then m.target_role when m.target_type = 'all' then '全部用户' else '' end as target_user_name from sys_msg m left join sys_user_profile p on m.target_type = 'user' and p.user_id = m.target_id where m.msg_id = #{msgId}

select m.msg_id, m.msg_type, m.title, m.content, m.order_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_name, m.priority, m.target_type, m.target_id, m.target_role, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, m.del_flag, case when r.read_id is not null then '1' else '0' end as is_read from sys_msg m left join sys_msg_read r on r.msg_id = m.msg_id and r.user_id = #{userId} where m.del_flag = '0' and (m.target_type = 'all' or (m.target_type = 'user' and find_in_set(#{userId}, m.target_id) > 0) or (m.target_type = 'role' and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_role ur join sys_role r2 on r2.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r2.role_key = m.target_role collate utf8mb4_general_ci ))) and m.msg_type = #{msgType} and r.read_id is null order by m.create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_msg
msg_type, title, content, order_id, sender_id, sender_name, priority, target_type, target_id, target_role, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{msgType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{orderId}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{priority}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetRole}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete: update sys_msg set del_flag = '1' where msg_id = #{msgId}

update sys_msg set del_flag = '1' where msg_id in
#{msgId}
